results.title: ICI la France: L'heritage de Napoleon
results.creator_credit: Mary Glasgow, Donald Carter and Associated Television
results.brief_description: French language training film - all dialogue is in French. A visit to Prince Murat, a descendant of Napoleon, who describes Napoleon’s activities as an administrator, and creator of the Civil Code and the Legion d’Honneur. He also founded a boarding school at St Denis for daughters of members of the Legion d’Honneur. A visit to this school shows how the traditions established by Napoleon are still being maintained.

results.title: I told 'em exactly how to do it
results.creator_credit: Sam Weiss, Irvine H. Millgate, Stephen Bosustow, Hoffman-La Roche and Stephen Bosustow Productions
results.brief_description: Uses a series of dramatised incidents involving a plant foreman and his attempts to communicate his wishes to his workers in order to stimulate discussion about the communication problems between supervisors and workers.

results.title: I think they call him John
results.creator_credit: John Krish, Jack Carruthers and Samaritan
results.brief_description: John Cartner Ronson spends a typical Sunday alone with his memories in his home in a huge block of London flats. Old miner, old soldier, old gardener, and old age pensioner, he has been living on his own since his wife died nine years ago. An old man’s life has become the ultimate expression of that much discussed twentieth century condition, the failure of communication.

results.title: I think
results.creator_credit: Gene Feldman and Wombat Productions, Inc.
results.brief_description: Deals with the difficulties facing children as they struggle to develop individual identities. Linda, a 10 year old, is subject to a variety of pressures to think and act as other people wish. Considers group identity, influence of the media, family and teachers.

results.title: I am Joe's spine
results.brief_description: Uses three-dimensional animation and live sequences to provide an understanding of the complexity of the spine’s construction and an awareness of what can happen when the spine and its surrounding muscles are not given proper care.

results.title: I am
results.creator_credit: Gene Feldman and Wombat Productions, Inc.
results.brief_description: Deals with the quest of a boy, entering adolescence, to discover who he is, what makes a person important, and how one gets to be somebody. Emphasises the importance of introspection, fantasy, and attempts at forming meaningful relationships in the development of the individual identity.

results.title: Understanding ourselves: human heredity
results.brief_description: Illustrates the basic concepts of heredity in an easily understandable context. The mechanism whereby human characteristics are passed from generation to generation is discussed. The function of chromosomes, genes, and DNA in the heredity pattern is explained. Also considers the influence of temperament, behaviour and mutation.
